_meta.definition: The set of activities related to processing film rentals and recording relevant details

rental._description: Tracks rental history of movies or other items for specific customers.

columns.name: rental_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in rental

columns.name: rental_date
columns.description: Stores timestamp of rental start dates in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS format.

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the inventory_ entity

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the customer_ entity

columns.name: return_date
columns.description: Stores the date and time when a movie rental was returned.

columns.name: staff_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the staff_ entity

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores timestamp of the most recent update for each rental record.
